summary: E2E verification of Tranchly V2 Credit Scoring Engine rollout. 13/13 backend pytest cases PASS covering V2 response schema, personal_guarantee + business_assets propagation, all 4 auto-reject triggers, Grade A/B/C tier distribution, 3% Reserve Fund accumulation in MongoDB, admin analytics reserve_fund + credit_model blocks, and admin applications V2 enrichment. Frontend Playwright E2E PASS covering Step1 V2 inputs, Step3 full result UI (grade card, layer bars, explanation, data quality, signal breakdown, reserve fund card), admin Applications Queue expanded V2 view, and admin Analytics page with Investor Protection Fund + Credit Model Performance cards. All V2 data-testids confirmed present and rendering live data.
critical_code_review_comments: Step 2 manual-data section uses a <details> HTML element for 'Or enter financial data manually' — the backend requires monthly_revenue when Plaid is not connected, but the form already collects monthly_revenue in Step 1. The manual panel in Step 2 (bank_balance, monthly_expenses, existing_debt, existing_loans) is optional. This is fine, but consider auto-opening the details if plaid_connected is false so users know they can submit without Plaid.

credit_scoring.py: total_signals advertised as 12 in data_sources, but UI/docs mention 15-signal model. Live_signals max is 6(Plaid)+3(Stripe)+1(fico)+1(assets)+1(platform)=12. Consider aligning messaging — Step 2 card says '3/12 live signals' while admin card title is '15-Signal Breakdown'.
Admin app card chips show 'Plaid / Stripe' regardless of connection state on some rows (need to verify — could be cosmetic badges rather than connection indicators).
server.py is ~1672 lines; exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers/loans.py, routers/admin.py, routers/auth.py for maintainability.
Login.jsx has no data-testid attributes on email/password/submit — adding them would make future E2E auth tests more robust (fallback to type=email/password worked here).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all data-testids render, full happy-path flow works)

test_credentials: Borrower borrower@test.com / test123 and Admin admin@test.com / test123 — both valid and working. /app/memory/test_credentials.md does not exist; recommend main agent add it for future testing agents.
seed_data_creation: Tests created ~6 loan applications during this run (TEST_V2 prefixed + a few auto-reject attempts). Reserve fund incremented by ~$4,500 across happy-path runs. No cleanup performed (DB cleanup not required for regression).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_v2_credit_scoring.py is the regression baseline for V2 — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. All 13 tests currently green. V2 schema keys asserted: score, grade, apr_range, apr_mid, max_loan_amount, layer_scores, signal_breakdown, explanation, data_quality_score, data_sources, reserve_fund_contribution, auto_reject, auto_reject_flags, approved_amount. Reserve fund verified via admin/analytics delta comparison. Frontend industry dropdown uses label values (e.g. 'SaaS', 'Technology') not slug values — remember to use label= in select_option. Step 2 manual fields are inside a <details> element that must be opened via JS: document.querySelectorAll('details').forEach(d=>d.open=true).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. V2 rollout verified end-to-end.
